"id": "", "title": "", "description": "", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "## [PostgreSQL OTel] I/O Health

This dashboard monitors I/O subsystem health:
- Buffer cache hit ratio (blks_hit vs blks_read)
- Checkpoint duration and count
- Background writer buffer writes by source
- Maxwritten stops (bgwriter overwhelmed)
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": []}}}}}, {"panelIndex": "023cbb3e-29cf-f995-42fa-0e7f43eadfe8", "gridData": {"x": 16, "y": 2, "w": 16, "h": 4, "i": "023cbb3e-29cf-f995-42fa-0e7f43eadfe8"}, "type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "attributes": {"title": "Buffer Hit Ratio", "visualizationType": "lnsMetric", "type": "lens", "references": [], "state": {"visualization": {"layerId": "d194bb0f-3f2d-b53f-4994-a20326dd3396", "layerType": "data", "metricAccessor": "33e7b0a1-d80b-7465-0fec-5160ddaffe27", "showBar": false, "applyColorTo": "background"}, "query": {"esql": "FROM metrics-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*

| EVAL hit_ratio = CASE(read + hit > 0, hit / (hit + read), 0.0)
